compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: 24h timer, sunrise/sunset simulation (0–30 min), auto-dim at temperature threshold, emergency auto-shutdown
compatible_devices.notes: EL1 has 1 control channel; handles up to 40 single-bus or 500 repeater-bus fixtures without a booster. Plug-and-play: cables included with each e-series fixture. Dimming range 50–115% (watts or % display). Ballasts must be set to EXT (external control) mode. Also listed as compatible with Gavita LEP (Light Emitting Plasma) fixtures. Gen 2 uses 15V power supply (vs 5V on Gen 1). No ECM auxiliary output — that is EL2-only.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 900e LED, Pro 1700e LED, Pro CT1930e LED
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter HGC906717 (25 ft) or HGC906716 (10 ft)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim at temperature threshold, emergency auto-shutdown, sunrise/sunset simulation, 24h timer
compatible_devices.notes: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter required for 900e, 1700e, and CT1930e LED fixtures; adapters use RJ45 connectors for daisy-chaining between fixtures. Adapter sold separately (HGC906717 or HGC906716). Up to 500 repeater-bus LED fixtures per channel with adapter. EL1 supports only 1 channel.
